chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Cr. B.A. No. S- 349 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) For orders on office objection. For hearing of main case. 29.04.2020 Mr. Bhagwandas Bheel, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Shahwak Rathore, Deputy Prosecutor General, Sindh. = Muhammad Saleem Jessar, J - Through this application, the Applicant seeks his admission on post-arrest bail in Crime No. 84 of 2019, registered at Police Station Samaro under sections 269, 270, 337-J PPC. 2. Heard learned counsel for applicant, learned D.P.G for the State and perused record. 3. Admittedly, the sections with which applicant stands charged are bailable except Section 337-J PPC (which was added later on); however, ingredients of same are to be established by the prosecution after recording evidence of the parties before the trial Court. At this juncture, prima facie case of the Applicant falls within the ambit of further inquiry as envisaged under sub-section to Section 497 Cr.P.C. Accordingly, instant Criminal Bail Application is hereby allowed. Consequently, the Applicant is admitted to bail subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand) and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of trial Court. 4. It need not to reiterate that the observation(s) made hereinabove is/are tentative in nature and shall not prejudice the case of either party during trial. JUDGE Tufail
